## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's progress, product updates, and potential investment opportunity with Summit Partners.](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has crossed $11M in run rate, projecting $15-16M by year-end and $45-50M next year](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Currently raising $40-60M in Series B, with advanced discussions ongoing with other investors](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Product evolution focuses on AI-driven content creation and AI visibility, addressing the changing landscape of SEO and content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Summit Partners interested but may be early in their typical investment cycle ($10-15M ARR range)](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Business Update

  - [Run rate just crossed $11M, likely to finish month at $11.5-12M](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Projecting $15-16M by year-end, $45-50M next year](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [70%+ gross margin, 0.5 burn multiple, 15+ magic number (indicating high efficiency)](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Launching self-serve AI visibility tool as a loss leader in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### Product Evolution and Market Positioning

  - [AI Answers becoming crucial for first sales interactions](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Focus on comprehensive, quality content creation to build trust and credibility](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [New workflow: Research → Outline → Draft → Edit → Fact-check → Publish](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Service-based approach, not just a tool, to ensure successful implementation](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Addressing $500B service market, with potential to disrupt traditional content/SEO agencies](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Fundraising Process

  - [Raising $40-60M in Series B](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [Advanced discussions with several investors, including Iconic](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Running an efficient process to balance fundraising with company operations](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [No banker involved, managing the process internally](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### Summit Partners' Interest and Next Steps

  - [Summit typically invests at $10-15M ARR range, making GrowthX potentially early](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Sydney to present to Summit's IC for initial interest assessment](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [If positive, potential for accelerated process and in-person meetings](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Alternative: Stay in touch for potential Series C involvement](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Market Trends in AI and Content Marketing

  - [Shift in content consumption patterns due to AI tools like ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Increasing importance of AI visibility and LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Need for businesses to adapt content strategies for AI-driven search and discovery](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send investment memo to Sydney via email](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

  - [Sydney to follow up with Marcel on Summit's interest and potential next steps](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [If interested, schedule potential in-person meeting in San Francisco or Menlo Park](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [If timing doesn't align, maintain relationship for potential future involvement (e.g., Series C)](https://fathom.video/share/kekvjnyW7PpV-1ZQMdZEHH-HsuLxYysJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
